Description: Storing sensitive data (tokens passwords PII) in plaintext on device
Prevention: Use flutter_secure_storage backed by iOS Keychain / Android Keystore; never store secrets in SharedPreferences

Description: App accepts any valid SSL certificate allowing MITM attacks via proxy tools
Prevention: Implement certificate pinning; pin to public key hash not certificate; have rotation plan

Description: API keys secrets and credentials embedded in source code
Prevention: Use --dart-define for build-time injection; use environment config; never commit secrets to VCS

Description: App runs on compromised devices without warning allowing data extraction
Prevention: Detect rooted/jailbroken devices; warn users; disable sensitive features on compromised devices
Code Bad: // No device integrity check\n// App runs identically on rooted/jailbroken devices\n// Sensitive data accessible via root access

Description: Using HTTP instead of HTTPS or allowing cleartext traffic
Prevention: Enforce HTTPS everywhere; configure Network Security Config (Android) and ATS (iOS)
Code Good:
<!-- Android: res/xml/network_security_config.xml -->
<network-security-config>
  <base-config cleartextTrafficPermitted= alse">
    <trust-anchors>
      <certificates src="system" />
    </trust-anchors>
  </base-config>
</network-security-config>

<!-- iOS: Info.plist -->
<key>NSAppTransportSecurity</key>
<dict>
  <key>NSAllowsArbitraryLoads</key>
  <false/>
</dict>"
Code Bad:
<!-- Android: Allows all cleartext -->
<application android:usesCleartextTraffic=	rue">

<!-- iOS: Disables all checks -->
<key>NSAllowsArbitraryLoads</key>
<true/>"

Description: No biometric authentication for sensitive operations
Prevention: Use local_auth for biometric; implement as additional factor not sole auth; handle fallback to PIN
Code Bad: // No biometric for sensitive operations\n// Payment confirmation without re-authentication\nawait processPayment(order); // No identity check

Description: Deep links that can be hijacked or exploited for unauthorized access
Prevention: Validate deep link parameters; require authentication for sensitive deep links; use universal links over custom schemes

Description: App binary can be easily decompiled revealing business logic and secrets
Prevention: Enable obfuscation for release builds; use ProGuard/R8 for Android; split debug symbols
Code Good:
# Flutter obfuscation
flutter build apk --obfuscate --split-debug-info=build/debug-info/
flutter build ipa --obfuscate --split-debug-info=build/debug-info/

# Android ProGuard rules
-keep class com.example.app.models.** { *; }
-keepattributes *Annotation*

# Store debug-info for crash symbolication
# Upload to Crashlytics/Sentry for readable stack traces
Code Bad:
# No obfuscation
flutter build apk
# Anyone can decompile and read all Dart code
# Business logic, API endpoints, validation rules all visible

Description: Sensitive data left in system clipboard accessible to other apps
Prevention: Clear clipboard after use; prevent copying of sensitive fields; use secure text fields

Description: User input not validated or sanitized before use
Prevention: Validate all input client-side AND server-side; sanitize before display; use parameterized queries
Code Bad: // Direct use of user input\nfinal query = textController.text;\nawait api.search(query); // No validation or sanitization

Description: Weak authentication implementation with no token rotation or proper session management
Prevention: Implement token refresh; set short access token expiry; clear all tokens on logout; revoke on server

Description: Sensitive screens visible in app switcher and susceptible to screenshots
Prevention: Prevent screenshots on sensitive screens; blur in app switcher; use FLAG_SECURE on Android
Code Bad: // Banking app shows account details in app switcher\n// No screenshot protection on payment screens\n// OTP visible in screen recording

Description: Debug features enabled in production builds exposing internal information
Prevention: Use kReleaseMode checks; strip debug logs; disable debug banners; remove dev tools

Description: Using outdated TLS versions or weak cipher suites
Prevention: Enforce TLS 1.2+; disable weak ciphers; validate certificate chain
Code Good:
// Enforce minimum TLS version
final client = HttpClient()
  ..badCertificateCallback = (cert, host, port) => false; // Reject bad certs

// Network Security Config (Android)
<network-security-config>
  <base-config cleartextTrafficPermitted= alse">
    <trust-anchors>
      <certificates src="system" />
    </trust-anchors>
  </base-config>
  <pin-set expiration="2025-01-01">
    <pin digest="SHA-256">base64hash=</pin>
  </pin-set>
</network-security-config>"
Code Bad: // Accept all certificates including self-signed\nclient.badCertificateCallback = (cert, host, port) => true;\n// Allows any MITM attack

Description: App sessions not properly managed when backgrounded or timed out
Prevention: Lock app after inactivity; re-authenticate on foreground; clear sensitive UI data when backgrounded
Code Bad: // App stays unlocked forever after login\n// Sensitive data visible in app switcher\n// No session timeout
